pageHeader.label: Discover
pageHeader.title: The Villa
pageHeader.description: 65 square meters of design living, three meters from crystal clear water.

outdoor.label: Outdoor
outdoor.title: Where Lake Meets Garden
paragraphs: The villa is surrounded by a breathtakingly landscaped garden, situated just steps from the crystal clear waters of the lake. As a guest, you'll have exclusive access to a private beach where you can take a refreshing swim in the clear and inviting waters.

The outdoor amenities include a hot and cold shower, sink, outdoor furniture with tables and umbrellas, and a spacious parking lot inside the property. There's even a unique sunbathing platform in the middle of the lake.

bedrooms.label: Interior
bedrooms.title: Bedrooms & Living
paragraphs: The house features a spacious living room with kitchen and sofa, plus a fully equipped kitchen with a 4-burner gas stove, dishwasher, refrigerator, kettle, and coffee machine.

Two double bedrooms with comfortable king-size beds and ample wardrobe space. A bathroom with a walk-in shower, WC, bidet, and electric heater rack. Air conditioning for cooling and heating in all rooms.
"Spend more time enjoying sunsets and less time streaming Netflix."

amenities.title: Private Beach
amenities.text: Exclusive lake access with outdoor shower

amenities.title: Wheelchair Accessible
amenities.text: Fully barrier-free, ramp entry, adapted bathroom

amenities.title: Pet Friendly
amenities.text: Small pets welcome (extra cleaning fee applies)

amenities.title: Lake & Island Views
amenities.text: San Giulio Island illuminated at night

accessibility.label: Accessibility
accessibility.title: Designed for Everyone
paragraphs: Villa Volpe is fully accessible for people with disabilities. The property was designed without architectural barriers and has been tested for functionality by people in wheelchairs.

features.heading: Ramp Entry
features.text: A ramp with a 12% gradient from the parking area to the house.

features.heading: Wheelchair-Friendly Layout
features.text: Step-free, with corridors wide enough for wheelchair passage.

features.heading: Accessible Bathroom
features.text: Equipped with handles, a specially designed shower, and a movable seat.

features.heading: Lakeside Access
features.text: On request, we can set up a people-lifting system for lake access.

cta.title: Seen Enough?
cta.subtitle: Book directly and save 15% compared to Airbnb.
